items.role: PhD in Chemical Engineering and Scientific Computing
items.summary: PhD candidate at Goldsmith Lab developing AI methods for materials discovery and catalyst search.
Led work on unsupervised pre-training and large-scale forecasting models for logistics optimization, including production systems at 10M-package/day scale.

items.role: Summer Research Intern, Electrochemical Energy Group
items.summary: Built self-supervised transformer frameworks for foundational PDE solvers across systems in PDEBench.
Developed AI Poincare for automated conservation-law discovery from differential equations.
